document.source_title: IPL 2026 Points Table Today: CSK’s playoff chances take blow after LSG defeat

claims.claim_text: Chennai Super Kings drop to sixth place in the IPL 2026 points table.
claims.evidence_text: CSK drop down to sixth with the loss, with Rajasthan Royals nudging above them due to the hit the five-time champions have taken on their net run rate with the defeat.

claims.claim_text: Lucknow Super Giants remain at the bottom of the IPL 2026 points table.
claims.evidence_text: LSG, on the other hand, remain rooted to the bottom of the table.

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India.
entities.evidence_text: Chennai Super Kings were handed a serious blow in their hopes for making it to the playoffs.

entities.name: Lucknow Super Giants
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India.
entities.evidence_text: Lucknow Super Giants defeated Chennai Super Kings.

events.evidence_text: after a comprehensive seven-wicket defeat to Lucknow Super Giants.
